name: hcportal_getSongs
description: Returns all non-removed songs from HC.Song with a membership flag (isInKennel) indicating whether each song is assigned to the specified kennel. @publicKennelId is resolved to the internal HC.Kennel.id (@kennelId), which is then used in the LEFT JOIN to HC.KennelSongMap — fixing the HC5 bug where the join used @publicKennelId directly and isInKennel always returned 0. Read-only query; uses READ UNCOMMITTED isolation level. isInKennel is returned as SMALLINT (not BIT).

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. @publicKennelId is passed as the paramString to ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: The public kennel GUID used to resolve the internal Kennel.id, which is then used in the LEFT JOIN to KennelSongMap to compute the isInKennel flag. Validated IS NULL before auth.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SongsList
rowsets.description: All non-removed songs from HC.Song ordered by SongName ASC. isInKennel uses the resolved internal @kennelId (not @publicKennelId) for the LEFT JOIN to KennelSongMap. Only returned when no errors occur.

columns.name: TuneOf
columns.description: Original tune this song is based on (HC.Song.TuneOf)

columns.name: AutoAddToKennel
columns.description: Flag indicating if this song should be auto-added to new kennels (HC.Song.AutoAddToKennel)

columns.name: AddedBy_KennelId
columns.description: Kennel that originally added this song (HC.Song.AddedBy_KennelId)

columns.name: AddedBy_UserId
columns.description: User that originally added this song (HC.Song.AddedBy_UserId)

columns.name: isInKennel
columns.description: Computed flag: 1 if the song exists in HC.KennelSongMap for this kennel (Removed = 0), 0 otherwise. Computed as CAST(CASE WHEN ksm.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SMALLINT). JOIN uses resolved internal @kennelId.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
